title: Nagqu Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Nagqu, with a Z-Score of -4.40. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Nagqu are extremely cold, with a high Z-Score indicating a significant deviation from normal temperatures. 
 The cold snap has resulted in a high Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 16.4 GG, while the Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value remains at 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 85% and the wind speed is 5.8 km/h, adding to the harsh weather conditions.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the effects of the cold snap immediately.
